Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, avg(comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight * 4.0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AND bs.state = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state = 'CO' WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp IN (timestamp '2018-01-01 12:00:00', timestamp '2018-04-10 12:00:00', timestamp '2018-07-19 12:00:00') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/3088bbae415bcc7d63147e1f79ade02fe854a557a0a6cb25a80d0cb4ede97055/88b81f8f-8615-428e-ac04-9acca3fe0c1d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
